name: playlist-import-job
description: Bulk-import every entry of a yt-dlp-supported playlist URL (YouTube, Vimeo, etc.) into a local `media` table. Single transaction, returns per-item counts and errors. Pair with background-job-template for very large playlists.
postInstall: 1. Install ytdlp-wrapper and media-utils first — this module depends on them
2. Make sure the `media` table exists with at least: title, type, url, thumbnail_url, duration, category, needs_ytdlp, is_adult (see db/migrations/playlist-import-media.sql for the minimal version)
3. If your media schema has different column names, edit the INSERT statement in lib/import-playlist.ts
4. POST a YouTube/Vimeo playlist URL — runs synchronously (one yt-dlp call + one DB transaction)
5. For playlists over a few hundred items, wrap this with the background-job-template so the HTTP request returns immediately and the client polls for progress
